title: poa nemoralis var. montana
intro: Poa nemoralis var. montana, also known as mountain meadow grass, is a variety of the wood meadow-grass plant that belongs to the Poaceae family. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, making it useful for treating various health issues. The health benefits of Poa nemoralis var. montana include its potential to reduce inflammation, improve digestive health, and support immune function. Herbal preparations of the plant can be made into teas, tinctures, and infusions, and it is often used in traditional medicine to promote overall well-being.
